message:
test: add regression tests for os.Stat error handling and HealthReport Error counter (gt-2dtpx)

TestProvisionFormulas_StatError verifies that non-IsNotExist stat errors
(via broken symlink) are surfaced as errors instead of silently swallowed.

TestCheckFormulaHealth_ErrorCounter verifies that unreadable formula files
(chmod 0000) are counted in the new HealthReport.Error field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
